name: Swing 365 Overland Park
about: Swing 365 Overland Park is a membership-based golf simulator venue offering access to private state-of-the-art golf simulators. The facility provides a warm and inviting private club atmosphere with 24/7 availability for booking simulator time online. Golfers can enjoy a round on 95+ virtual courses, practice their skills, or play with friends in individual suites. The venue operates on a membership model, with a limited number of memberships available, and offers the flexibility to book sessions by the hour.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing™ Pro Series with high-speed infrared tracking for realistic data
Ability to bring your own food and drinks for a comfortable experience

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons are encouraged to bring their own food and beverages.
Patrons are encouraged to bring their own beverages (BYOB).

simulator_hardware.notes: Features 688 infrared sensors across two tracks to measure ball mid-flight at the speed of light.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue explicitly states that you can bring your own food and beverages (BYOB/Food).

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulation. Time can vary based on the simulator software and number of players in your group.

faq.answer: The available information does not specifically mention if the venue is kid-friendly or offers activities for juniors/youth.
